briefs.title: Short-Term Rental Registration Rules Clarified: Seasonal Units Exempt, Suites Need Separate Registration
briefs.summary: BC amended its Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation to exempt seasonal, non-year-round accommodations from registration and clarify that each accessory dwelling unit or secondary suite requires its own registration, even if the primary unit is already registered.
briefs.action_required: Register each secondary suite or accessory dwelling unit separately on the BC short-term rental registry.

key_dates.label: BC Short-Term Rental Accommodations Regulation amendments take effect
